name: Glimpse Group, Inc.
business: The Glimpse Group is an immersive technology company providing enterprise-focused Virtual Reality, Augmented Reality, and Spatial Computing software and services, primarily to B2B and B2B2C customers. In fiscal year 2024, the company shifted its focus to Spatial Computing, Cloud, and Artificial Intelligence, led by its Spatial Core product. The company targets verticals including Corporate Training, Education, Healthcare, Government & Defense, Branding/Marketing/Advertising, Retail, Media & Entertainment, Corporate Events, and Social VR support groups and therapy.
sellsTo: Social VR support groups and therapy

exposures.sentence: We are an Immersive technology company, providing enterprise focused Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR) and Spatial Computing software and services (Immersive technologies).

In fiscal year 2024, we shifted our businesses ( Strategic Shift ) to focus on providing immersive technology solutions software and services that are primarily driven by Spatial Computing, Cloud and Artificial Intelligence ( AI ), including our product Spatial Core, led by our entity Brightline Interactive, LLC ( BLI ).
primarily targeting the Department of Defense ( DoD ) and large enterprise segments.

catalysts.event: Entered into a $2+ million SpatialCore contract
catalysts.sentence: SpatialCore Contract On August 13, 2025 we entered into a $2+ million SpatialCore contract to be delivered over a 12 month period.
